zh.lifeSummary: 當Mary Merritt於1632年6月1日出生在英國英格蘭倫敦時，她的父親James Merritt Jr.4歲，母親Mary Nelson9歲。她於大約1669年與Walter Dobbs在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1737年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可享年104歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Mary Merritt于1632年6月1日出生在英国英格兰倫敦时，她的父亲James Merritt Jr.4岁，母亲Mary Nelson9岁。她于大约1669年与Walter Dobbs在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1737年3月22日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 約克 可隆尼素福爾可享年104岁。

nameMeanings.name: Merritt
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Merriott , Marriott , or Marritt. The last of these is most often a variant of Merriott or Marriott , but possibly in some instances from Middle English Marret or Merret, a syncopated form of Margaret, Mergeret.

variants.name: Merritts
meanings: English: variant of or patronymic from   Merritt   2.

variants.name: Merriott
meanings: habitational name from Merriott in Somerset. The placename may derive from Old English mere, miere ‘mare’, mere ‘pool’, or (ge)mǣre ‘boundary’ + geat ‘gate, gap’.

from the Middle English male personal name Meryet (Old English Mǣrgēat, from mǣre ‘famous’ + Gēat, a tribal name). In post-medieval times, both this surname and the placename in 1 above underwent changes in pronunciation, sometimes by confusion with Marriott , and often by losing the medial -i- or -y-, hence Merritt , Meritt , and so on.

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
After the English took over in the 1660s, the colony was renamed New York, after the Duke of York

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

historicEvents.title: South Sea Bubble
historicEvents.description: The South Sea Bubble Bill was passed by the House of Lords in 1720. This allowed the South Sea company to monopolize trade with South America. The company underwrote the English National Debt which promised 5% interest from the government. As shares rose exponentially, many companies were created and many fortunes were made. The stocks crashed and many people lost their money which caused them to become destitute overnight and suicide was common.  Robert Walpole took charge of the South Sea Bubble Financial Crisis by dividing the national debt between the Bank of England, the Treasury, and the Sinking Fund.

en.lifeSummary: When Mary Merritt was born on 1 June 1632, in London, England, United Kingdom, her father, James Merritt Jr., was 4 and her mother, Mary Nelson, was 9. She married Walter Dobbs about 1669, in New York Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 22 March 1737, in Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 104.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Mary Merritt est née le 1 juin 1632, à Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, James Merritt Jr., avait 4 ans et sa mère, Mary Nelson, avait 9 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Dobbs environ 1669, à New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 22 mars 1737, à Suffolk, New York Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 104 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Merritt è nata il il 1 giugno 1632 nel London, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, James Merritt Jr., aveva 4 anni e sua madre, Mary Nelson, aveva 9 anni. Lei sposato Walter Dobbs circa 1669, nel New York Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 22 marzo 1737, nel Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 104 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Mary Merrittが1632年6月1日にイギリスイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父James Merritt Jr.は4歳，母Mary Nelsonは9歳であった。約1669年にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニーでWalter Dobbsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1737年3月22日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ヨーク コロニースフォルクで104歳で死去した。

ko.Barren Island, Suffolk, New York Colony,: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크

ko.lifeSummary: Mary Merritt(이)가 1632년 6월 1일 영국 잉글랜드 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 James Merritt Jr.(은)는 4세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mary Nelson(은)는 9세였다. 그녀는 대략 1669년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이에서 Walter Dobbs(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1737년 3월 22일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 요르크 콜론이 수폴크에서 104세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Mary Merritt nasceu em 1 de junho de 1632, em London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, James Merritt Jr., tinha 4 anos e sua mãe, Mary Nelson, tinha 9 anos. Ela casou-se com Walter Dobbs aproximadamente 1669, em New York Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 22 de março de 1737, em Suffolk, New York Colony, British Colonial America, com 104 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Mary Merritt родилась 1 июня 1632 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени James Merritt Jr. было 4 года, а матери, которую звали Mary Nelson, 9. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Dobbs около 1669 г. в местности ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 22 марта 1737 г. в местности суффолк, ню ерк колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 104 лет.
